name: dev-switch
description: DevSwitch is a cross-platform desktop application built with Electron and React that simplifies the management of multiple Git profiles and SSH keys. Whether you're a developer juggling personal and work accounts, or managing multiple client projects, DevSwitch streamlines SSH key generation, configuration, and profile switching.

extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Your app needs access to the Documents folder to save and load files.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Your app needs access to the Downloads folder to save and load files.
extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Your app needs access to the Desktop folder to save and load files.
extendInfo.NSFullDiskAccessUsageDescription: Your app needs full disk access to read and write files across the system.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Your app needs access to the microphone for audio input.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Your app needs access to the camera for video input.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Your app needs screen recording access to capture your screen.
extendInfo.NSAccessibilityUsageDescription: Your app needs accessibility access for enhanced features.
extendInfo.NSInputMonitoringUsageDescription: Your app needs input monitoring access to provide input features.
